sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104755" key="triakontamo/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐᾱκοντᾰ-μόριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104755.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing thirty degrees,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ζῴδια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:1:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
